chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The supplication for the illnesses and diseases

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/431)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/431)
text: تَضَعُ يَدَكَ عَلَى الْمَوْضِعِ الَّذِي فِيهِ الْوَجَعُ وَ تَقُولُ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ
اللَّهُ اللَّهُ رَبِّي حَقّاً لَا أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئاً اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ لَهَا وَ لِكُلِّ عَظِيمَةٍ فَفَرِّجْهَا عَنِّي .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from one of his companions, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Dawood Bin Zurby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘You should place your hand upon painful place, and you should be saying three times,

‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is my Lord<sup>azwj</sup> truly. I do not associate anything with Him<sup>azwj</sup>. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! You<sup>azwj</sup> are (the help) for it (the pain), and for all great troubles, so (please) Relieve it from me’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from certain individuals of his people from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Dawud ibn Razin from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Place your hand over the painful part and say three times: Allah, Allah, my Lord in all truth, I do not believe in anything as His partner, O Lord, You are (the help) for this and all the great troubles, provide me relief from this pain.’”
